pi_items.source: Task description explicitly states description should be 'Week 50 Petty Cash Expenses'
iDempiere document status code 'CO' means 'Complete' per iDempiere wiki and documentation; task description requires 'Completed' status
Task description explicitly lists 'Charge: Freight' as first line item
Task description states amount -75.00 (negative for expense); metadata stores absolute value 75.00; verifier checks abs(line_amt) at line 102 against metadata amount
Task description explicitly lists 'Charge: Bank Fee' as second line item
Task description states amount -25.00 (negative for expense); metadata stores absolute value 25.00; verifier checks abs(line_amt) at line 102 against metadata amount

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a synthetic Cash Journal entry in iDempiere for GardenWorld with statement date 2024-12-15, description containing 'Week 50', and final document status 'CO' (Completed). Two line items are created: Freight charge with absolute amount 75.00 and Bank Fee charge with absolute amount 25.00. All metadata values have been independently verified against the task description and iDempiere documentation.
